title: test(chatglm): add tests for invalid API and timeout scenarios
body_text:
## Description
Add tests to verify ChatGLM chat model's error handling for invalid API addresses and timeouts, covering sync, async, and streaming request modes.

## Verification
- Ran `make format`, `make lint` and `make test` from the root of the `langchain` package, all checks passed (only minor type checker import warnings, no impact on test execution).
- Manually executed the new test cases to confirm they correctly validate error behaviors of ChatGLM under invalid API/timeout scenarios.

## Additional Notes
- No breaking changes, no dependency modifications, and no updates to `uv.lock`/`pyproject.toml` files.
- This PR only touches the `langchain` package (specifically test files under `chat_models`), adhering to single-package modification guidelines.
